items.title: Perplexity turns your Mac mini into a 24/7 AI agent
items.summary:
At its first developer conference, held in a former North Beach church, Perplexity unveiled Personal Computer, expanded its cloud agent to enterprise, opened up finance data tools, and staked its identity on a single claim: AI is the computer now. Two weeks after launching Perplexity Computer, a cloud-based AI agent that can orchestrate 20 frontier […]

items.title: Google Maps is getting an AI ‘Ask Maps’ feature and upgraded ‘immersive’ navigation
items.summary: The tech giant says the "Immersive Navigation" launch is the biggest update to Maps in over a decade.

items.title: NVIDIA invests $2 billion in Nebius
items.summary:
NVIDIA has agreed to invest $2 billion in Nebius Group, the Amsterdam-based AI cloud company that emerged from the wreckage of Yandex after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, in a deal that pairs a substantial capital injection with a deep technical partnership aimed at deploying more than 5 gigawatts of NVIDIA-powered compute capacity by the […]
This story continues at The Next Web

items.title: Elaia closes its third deep-tech seed fund at €134M
items.summary:
The Paris-based VC backed by Bpifrance and Université PSL has exceeded the €120M goal it set at first close in March 2024. When Elaia first raised its third deep-tech seed fund in March 2024, the target was €120 million. The final figure has come in higher. The Paris-based venture capital firm has closed its DTS3 […]
This story continues at The Next Web

items.title: Into the Omniverse: How Industrial AI and Digital Twins Accelerate Design, Engineering and Manufacturing Across Industries
items.summary: Industrial AI, digital twins, AI physics and accelerated AI infrastructure are empowering companies across industries to accelerate and scale the design, simulation and optimization of products, processes and facilities before building in the real world.

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A doctor is sitting across a desk from a patient. The doctor is holding a tablet and a pen. Medical charts renderings are in the background.

items.title: Wonderful raises $150M Series B to scale its enterprise AI agents across 30 countries
items.summary:
The Amsterdam-headquartered startup has been out of stealth for just eight months, but it already has 350 staff, production deployments across four continents, and a valuation reportedly approaching $1.7 billion There is a problem that every major enterprise AI deployment eventually runs into: the gap between a convincing demo and a working system in production. […]

items.title: Zendesk acquires Forethought in its biggest deal in two decades
items.summary:
The 2018 Startup Battlefield winner is joining Zendesk as the race to own agentic customer service accelerates When Forethought won the TechCrunch Startup Battlefield competition in 2018, ChatGPT was four years from existing. The company’s pitch, that AI could handle customer service conversations autonomously, was considered ambitious to the point of eccentricity. On Wednesday, Zendesk […]
This story continues at The Next Web

items.title: Wonderful raises $150M Series B at $2B valuation
items.summary: The funding round, led by Insight Partners, comes just four months after Wonderful raised a $100 million Series A.

items.title: Coding After Coders: The End of Computer Programming as We Know It
items.summary: In the era of A.I. agents, many Silicon Valley programmers are now barely programming. Instead, what they’re doing is deeply, deeply weird. Lately, Manu Ebert has been trying to keep his A.I. from humiliating him. I recently visited Ebert, a machine-learning engineer and former neuroscientist, at the …

items.title: GeForce NOW Raises the Game at the Game Developers Conference
items.summary: GeForce NOW is bringing the game to the Game Developers Conference (GDC), running this week in San Francisco. While developers build the future of gaming, GeForce NOW is delivering it to gamers. The latest updates bring smoother performance, easier game discovery and a fresh lineup of blockbuster titles to the cloud. Game discoverability gets a […]

items.title: Google is using old news reports and AI to predict flash floods
items.summary: A new way to solve data scarcity: Turning qualitative reports into quantitative data with an LLM.
